race.description: Good As Gold Provincial Mdn Hcp
race.comment: LE SMOKE (7) made her Australian debut after coming across from New Zealand with a tidy sixth over 1250m at Newcastle. Strips fitter from the better gate and has the upside to win this. BROADWAY STREET (2) resumes. Kept safe in betting on debut with the 59kg to secure fourth over 1300m at Hawkesbury. Back without a trial and stays in the mix with Rawiller engaged. CODENAME (8) resumes. Sat on the speed at his second race start with an improved fifth over 1200m at Gosford last November. Looks ready to go with the two excellent trials. Well drawn and sure to be thereabouts. PACIFIC MICK (4) first-up after six months he ran on well to secure third over 1100m at Hawkesbury. Back in good order and will appreciate the 3kg claim. Each way.
